ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded values */,
  "amsteoe" REAL /* Value of the AMSTEOE index */,
  "daxindx" REAL /* Value of the DAXINDX index */,
  "ftse100" REAL /* Value of the FTSE100 index */,
  "hngkngi" REAL /* Value of the HNGKNGI index */,
  "japdowa" REAL /* Value of the JAPDOWA index */,
  "sngalls" REAL /* Value of the SNGALLS index */,
  "spcomp" REAL /* Value of the SPCOMP index */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "open_value" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "close_value" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the index during the day */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the index during the day */,
  "source_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange from which the data is sourced */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the data (e.g., 'verified', 'estimated') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., AMSTEOE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the index */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency in which the index is denominated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the index is based */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the index is based */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry the index represents */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the index was first created or started tracking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the index data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., 'desktop', 'mobile') */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., summary statistics) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., 'trend analysis', 'correlation analysis') */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file if stored in a file system */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
